channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Spain Advances to World Cup Quarter-Finals Despite Fan Concerns
item.description: Spain has made history by advancing to the World Cup quarter-finals for the first time since 1950, showcasing a defensive mastery that has kept them unbeaten in five matches. The team’s current squad,...

item.title: Prosecutors Unfazed by VP Sara's Potential Participation in Impeachment Trial
item.description: The article discusses the stance of prosecutors in the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, stating that they remain undeterred even if she appears in the proceedings. Spokesman David Diz...

item.title: Trump Removes Election Commission Members Amid Electoral Controversies
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump terminated the members of the Election Assistance Commission (EAC), an independent federal body that supports election administration nationwide. The decision followed Trum...

item.title: Legal battle over free speech and workplace rights in pianist dismissal case
item.description: An international concert pianist, Jayson Lloyd Gillham, is set to face a court decision regarding his alleged unfair dismissal by the Melbourne Symphony Orchestra (MSO) over comments he made about Gaz...

item.title: France Advances to World Cup Semifinals with Mbappé's Eight Goals
item.description: France secured a dominant 2-0 victory over Morocco in the World Cup quarterfinals, with Kylian Mbappé scoring his eighth goal of the tournament to propel Les Bleus into the semifinals. The match, held...

item.title: JAAC Announces Resumption of March on Muzaffarabad Amid Unmet Demands and Casualties
item.description: The Joint Awami Action Committee (JAAC) has announced plans to resume its long march on Muzaffarabad on July 15 if its demands remain unmet by July 14. Core member Umar Nazir Kashmiri stated that the ...

item.title: DSS Plans Legal Action Against Journalist Zainab Sodiq Amid Controversy
item.description: Omoyele Sowore, a human rights activist and AAC presidential candidate, alleges that the Department of State Services (DSS) is planning to arraign journalist Zainab Sodiq on an 'unknown offence' as re...

item.title: France Advances to Semis After Dominant 2-0 Win Over Morocco in 2026 World Cup
item.description: France secured their place in the semi-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup with a hard-fought 2-0 victory over Morocco in the last-eight clash. Didier Deschamps’ team dominated possession but had to wai...

item.title: Sandiganbayan denies Jinggoy Estrada's request to attend Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The Sandiganbayan Fifth Division has rejected Senator Jinggoy Estrada's motion to attend the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, citing lack of merit. In a seven-page resolution dated Ju...

item.title: Edmonton Man Faces Second-Degree Murder Charges in Chinatown Killings
item.description: Justin Bone, accused of second-degree murder in the 2022 killings of Hung Trang and Ban Phuc Hoang in Edmonton's Chinatown, testified in court. During his trial, a 49-minute video was presented showin...

item.title: France advances to World Cup semi-finals with victory over Morocco
item.description: France secured a 2-0 victory over Morocco in their FIFA World Cup quarter-final clash, advancing to the semi-finals. Kylian Mbappe, the star striker, recovered from a first-half penalty miss to score ...

item.title: Federal Court Upholds Illinois Ban on Semiautomatic Weapons
item.description: A federal appeals court in the United States has upheld an Illinois law banning semiautomatic weapons, overturning a previous lower-court ruling that deemed the ban unconstitutional. The decision, iss...

item.title: Nuclear Disarmament and Environmental Concerns in a Changing World
item.description: The article highlights the urgent need for nuclear disarmament and environmental protection, emphasizing the interconnectedness of climate change, nuclear energy, and global sustainability. It discuss...

item.title: Bankipur bypoll highlights BJP's stronghold with JSP challenge
item.description: The Bankipur Assembly by-election in Bihar is shaping up as a crucial contest between Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) candidate Abhishek Kumar Sinha and Jan Suraaj Party (JSP) founder Prashant Kishor. Th...

item.title: Czech duo Muchova and Noskova secure Wimbledon final spot after thrilling semi-finals
item.description: Karolina Muchova overcame severe physical challenges to defeat Coco Gauff in a nerve-wracking Wimbledon semi-final, securing a place in the final against compatriot Linda Noskova. The Czech player, ba...

item.title: Senior Officials Face Corruption Charges in Ekurhuleni EMPD Scandal
item.description: Four senior municipal officials, including former Ekurhuleni City Manager Imogen Mashazi and suspended EMPD acting chief Julius Mkhwanazi, are facing fraud, corruption, and defeating the ends of justi...

item.title: Rock In Rio Lisbon 2026: A Spectacular Festival Experience
item.description: The Rock In Rio Lisbon 2026 festival delivered an unparalleled blend of music, innovation, and immersive experiences. One standout feature was the zipline that allowed fans to soar above the main stag...

item.title: Unsuccessful Mayoral Candidate Meets with Trump at White House
item.description: Spencer Pratt, an unsuccessful Los Angeles mayoral candidate who finished third in the July primary election, visited the White House on July 7 and met with President Donald Trump. The meeting occurre...

item.title: Cyclosporiasis Outbreak in the U.S.: California Residents Need to Be Aware
item.description: Cyclosporiasis, a parasitic intestinal infection caused by Cyclospora cayetanensis, has seen a significant surge in cases across the U.S., with over 1,000 reported in Michigan alone. The outbreak, pri...

item.title: Three TMC Leaders Join BJP Ahead of Rajya Sabha Bypolls
item.description: Three former Trinamool Congress (TMC) leaders—Sukhendu Sekhar Roy, Sushmita Dev, and Prakash Chik Baraik—who resigned from the Rajya Sabha in June, officially joined the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) i...
